description_long: This is a large, antique wooden chest with a rectangular form and a hinged lid. The exterior is predominantly dark, with visible wear and patina, suggesting significant age and use. The front and sides are adorned with hand-painted floral motifs framed in reddish-brown panels, adding a decorative touch to its otherwise utilitarian design. The chest sits on short, sturdy feet and has a keyhole at the front, indicating a locking mechanism. The back is plain, with two metal hinges visible at the top. The overall craftsmanship and painted details suggest it may have been used for storage in a domestic or urban setting, such as a hallway, garage, or communal area.
description: A large, antique wooden chest with dark, worn surfaces and hand-painted floral motifs on the front and sides. It features a hinged lid, keyhole, and sturdy feet, with visible signs of age and use.
description_view_0: The left side of the chest, showing a single painted floral motif framed in a reddish-brown panel, with visible wear on the lower edge.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying two large painted floral motifs, a central keyhole, and the most decorative surface of the chest.
description_view_2: The right side, similar to the left, with a single painted motif and more pronounced wear at the bottom.
description_view_3: The back of the chest, plain and undecorated, with two visible metal hinges and a wooden surface showing age and patina.
